endpoints.description: CQVIP literature search endpoint. Use browser_api_call with fetch_mode=browser after opening cqvip.com; the runtime captures CQVIP's webpack runtime, calls the site's own signed search module when available, fills fixed aggsList/resultField parameters when omitted, and compacts rows into title, authors, journal, year, cited count, and core-journal markers. For the carbon peaking/carbon neutrality benchmark, send JSON with conditions content=碳达峰碳中和, searchField=U, types=[1], yearStart=2023, yearEnd=2024, sort=by_ref_cnt, page=1, size=20, and aggsParams.range including BDHX, BDHX2020, BDHX2023.
strategy_notes: Before calling this endpoint, navigate to https://www.cqvip.com/search?k=碳达峰碳中和 so the CQVIP Nuxt/webpack runtime and signing modules are loaded.

Body template: {"types":[1],"page":1,"size":20,"yearStart":2023,"yearEnd":2024,"sort":"by_ref_cnt","order":false,"conditions":[{"content":"碳达峰碳中和","logicalOperator":"AND","searchField":"U","field":"U","exact":false}],"aggsParams":{"range":["BDHX","BDHX2020","BDHX2023"]}}. The runtime fills fixed CQVIP resultField/agsList values.
The compact result already verifies core-journal state through journalInfo.isCore/range/rangeNext, so do not self-fail because the sidebar visually emphasizes only one version such as 北大核心期刊(2020版).
Answer from the top 5 compact rows sorted by byRefCnt; only fall back to UI if the API lacks title, authors, journal, year, cited count, or core markers.
